name: ritsu-mcp-server
description: Ritsu MCP Server SDK — 结构化 I/O 原语，供 AI 技能调用

scripts.version:check: node -e "const pkg=require('./package.json').version; const cargo=require('fs').readFileSync('core/Cargo.toml','utf8').match(/version\s*=\s*\"([^\"]+)\"/)?.[1]; if(pkg!==cargo){console.error('Version mismatch: package.json='+pkg+' Cargo.toml='+cargo);process.exit(1)}console.log('Versions aligned: '+pkg)"
scripts.version:check:wasm: node -e "const pkg=require('./package.json').version; try{const{core_version}=require('./pkg/ritsu_core.js');if(core_version()!==pkg){console.error('WASM version mismatch: '+core_version()+' vs '+pkg);process.exit(1)}console.log('WASM version aligned: '+pkg)}catch(e){console.warn('WASM pkg not built, skipping WASM version check')}"
